name: First Sunday Bird Walk
description:
First Sunday Outing — Sowl Kere (Saul Kere)Time: Meet at 6:45 AM | Walk begins at 7:00 AMMeeting Point: Google Map(Near Adarsh Gem and Ecospace back gate; Parking available.)   Walk details:• Duration: Till around 9:45 AM (lake gates close at 10 AM)• Terrain: Level, approximately 2 km around the lake• Suitable for all ages—you may leave whenever you wish.   What to wear:• Dull-coloured clothes• Hats/caps• Comfortable walking shoes (avoid slippers or thin-soled sandals—the path is unpaved)•⁠ ⁠Rainwear or warm clothing, depending on the weather forecast   What to bring:• Binoculars, bird books/apps• Camera• Notebook/sketchpad and pencil (optional)• Drinking water and snacks   Nearby facilities:Restaurants and washrooms are available at• The Bay, EcoSpace Food Court: https://maps.app.goo.gl/aycdV3gUcrkpRmt18?g_st=ipc (Paid parking)• The Marketplace, Adarsh Palm Retreat (approx. 500 m from the lake, paid valet parking available): Google Map   This walk is free and open to all.
We look forward to meeting you on Sunday.
BlrBirders

name: Second Sunday Bird Walk
description:
Where: Jakkur Lake
Meeting time: 7 am (walk ends by 9:30 am)   No registration is needed for this event.   Meeting point: https://maps.google.com/?cid=1444929533645339597&entry=gps (Main Gate)   Nearest Public Transport: Catch the Airport bus, KIA-9, from ‘Majestic’ to ‘Kogilu Cross’. Take an auto from there for the last 3 km to the lake, or take 283B to Raitarasanthe Yelahanka and choose to walk/catch an auto from there for the last 2
km.   Wear: Dull-coloured clothes, hats/caps, comfortable walking shoes, rain gear if there is rain forecast.   Bring: Notebook, pen/pencil and water.   Optional: Bird books/apps, binoculars, cameras, and snacks that you may need.   Post-outing breakfast restaurant (with parking available):New Krishna Sagar Food Court location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/onMmdCgWzKfz9n9C8   We look forward to meeting you on Sunday!   BlrBirders

name: Second Sunday Bird Walk
description:
(Requires prior registration | Limited to 25 participants)   Registrations open at 8:30 pm on the second Thursday of the month    Time:Meet at 6:15 AMWalk begins at 6:30 AM   Meeting Point:Gargi Estate: 
https://maps.app.goo.gl/SdPycTFSSD2g6YYJ8?g_st=aw    Register here     Walk details:   • Duration: Till around 9:45 AM• Terrain: Unpaved, undulating and uneven• Suitable for all ages• Children below 13 years of age need not be registered separately but must be accompanied by a responsible adult   What to wear:   • Dull-coloured clothes• Hats/caps• Comfortable walking shoes (avoid slippers or thin-soled sandals)• Rainwear or warm clothing depending on the weather forecast   What to bring:   • Binoculars, bird books/apps (recommended)• Camera (optional)• Notebook/sketchpad and pencil (optional)• Drinking water and snacks (recommended) — please arrange to take back your waste   TRANSPORT   Carpooling recommended.
Please coordinate your shared commute in the BlrBirders Carpooling group:
   Getting there by public transport (please check updated routes and schedules):   • Namma Metro (return journey only):
   Nearest station is Silk Institute (Green Line) – From here, the meeting point can be reached by auto or cab (3 km/ approx. 5 minutes)   • BMTC buses: Bus services from Kengeri Terminus and Kanakapura Road. The nearest bus stop is Silk Institute. A short auto or cab ride will get you to the meeting point. Carpooling recommended for safety.   Important notes:   • As this is a forest area with known movement of wildlife, we request participants to stay with the group and avoid moving about independently. KFD staff will accompany the group to ensure everyone’s safety   • We request you to arrive on time, as late arrivals may not be able to enter the forest   • Please be prepared to stay for the entire duration of the walk, as participants cannot leave the group unaccompanied   • There are no restaurants or washrooms along the trail   • Since parking is limited, carpooling is kindly advised   • Suggested post-outing restaurant options for breakfast:
   Udupi Garden, B M Kaval, opp Art of Living   https://maps.app.goo.gl/hnqFBmpEsELvkTmc7?g_st=ic   (There are many other restaurant options in this area)   The RangaVilas Cafe – Banashankari 6th Stage, near Sompura Toll   https://maps.app.goo.gl/AZZnH9sfMz9gobrd9?g_st=ic      Registration:   • Group size restricted to 25• Registrations open on Thursday evening and will be announced in the BlrBirders WhatsApp community• Please await confirmation by email• Please join the walk ONLY if your participation has been confirmed• As with our other limited walks, we kindly request you to wait for three months before registering for this walk again (even if you dropped out of last months walk) to give others the opportunity to experience this wildlife habitat in the city.   Thank you!BlrBirders Volunteers

name: Third Sunday Bird Walk
description:
WhereHesaraghatta Grasslands, we meet at the Animal Quarantine And Certification Services Hessarghatta Office and proceed from there towards ‘Rassba Farm’, where we will park our vehicles and use their facilities. We cross over to the grasslands from there to start the walk.   Nearest Bus Stop: CFSP Farm Stop, 2.6 Km/30 mins walk to the animal quarantine center office. Buses plying from Yelahanka towards Byatha stop here.    MapWe meet at https://maps.app.goo.gl/hS7DyGVL2FMJcnGh7 (please follow Google Maps to this place, to avoid muddy roads as much as possible) and proceed towards https://maps.app.goo.gl/5oUqJRzyANaJ735J7.   Wear: Dull-coloured clothes, hats/caps, comfortable walking shoes, rain gear if there is rain forecast.   Bring: Notebook and a pen/pencil, and water.   Optional: Bird books/apps, binoculars, cameras, and any snacks you may need.
   Post outing, one can opt for breakfast at Rassba Farms by ordering on the spot.   We look forward to meeting you on Sunday.   BlrBirders

location.name: Rassba Farm, Animal Quarantine and Certification Services

name: Fourth Sunday Bird Walk
description:
Where: Valley School
Meeting time: 6:30 am (walk ends by 9:30 am)   Registrations open at 8 pm on the Third Sunday of every month.   Registration is needed to participate in this walk, registrations open on the 3rd Sunday Night at 8 pm on this site and runs out very soon. Maximum 30 registrations allowed.     Revisit on 3rd Sunday night at 8 pm    Meeting point: https://maps.google.com/?cid=1444929533645339597&entry=gps   Nearest Public Transport: Catch going towards Kanakapura and get down at the Valley School Cross Bus Stop. Walk about 2 kms to reach the place. The nearest Metro is Silk Institute. Catch an auto to Valley School.   Wear: Dull-coloured clothes, hats/caps, comfortable walking shoes, rain gear if there is rain forecast.   Bring: Notebook, pen/pencil and water.   Optional: Bird books/apps, binoculars, cameras, and snacks that you may need.   Post-outing breakfast restaurant (Road-side parking available):Rajatagiri Palace: https://maps.app.goo.gl/onMmdCgWzKfz9n9C8   We look forward to meeting you on Sunday!   BlrBirders

name: Fifth Sunday Bird Walk
description:
Time:Walk begins at 6:30 AMMeeting point:
Upper Ambalipura Lake: https://maps.app.goo.gl/dRmsJf5uf39hJUKA7   Walk details:• Duration: Till around 9:45 AM• Terrain: Unpaved, undulating and uneven• Suitable for all ages• Children below 13 years of age need not be registered separately but must be accompanied by a responsible adult   What to wear:• Dull-coloured clothes• Hats/caps• Comfortable walking shoes (avoid slippers or thin-soled sandals)• Rain-gear or warm clothing depending on the weather forecast   What to bring: • Binoculars, bird books/apps (recommended)• Camera (optional)• Notebook/sketchpad and pencil (optional)• Drinking water and snacks (recommended) — please arrange to take back your waste     This Walk is free and open to all.   Thank you!BlrBirders Volunteers
